Name: Graco Ultra QuickShot
Short description: The Ultra QuickShot is a breakthrough technology, designed to deliver higher quality and provide results faster, created for the perfect airless finish, while virtually eliminating spits.
Description:
The Ultra QuickShot is a breakthrough technology, designed to deliver higher quality and provide results faster, created for the perfect airless finish, while virtually eliminating spits. Built with extreme spray control to quickly adjust pressure for every application.

The industry's most portable sprayer allows you to spray in the tightest of areas with precision and the highest control. Spray the broadest range of architectural coatings, from water-based paints, to solvents, and flammable-based materials. Perfect for small jobs such as cabinets, doors, trim, soffits, gutters, and more.

Instant Response Electric Powered Gun Virtually Eliminates Spits

Reduce fatigue with the industry's lightest trigger pull

Smallest, lightest airless gun ever built

Responds instantly to produce the best finish

On-Demand Precision Flow-Control System

Quickly adjust the material flow for extreme airless spray control

Easily dial-in to your desired pressure from 100-2,000 psi

6 ft Flexible Hose For Full Reach & Easy Hose Management

Easily prime, change colors, and clean in seconds

The gun and hose hold only 1 oz of coating

QuickShot ProConnect Airless Piston Pump

Durable long-life triple piston pump

32 oz Pour-N-Go Cup

Easy fill design - refill on your hip

Spray small amounts FAST

Power to Take on Every Small Job

It comes with two DEWALT 20V Lithium-ion batteries

Spray up to one gallon on each battery

Ultimate Hands-Free Portability With Belt and Holster Attachment

Name: SurPro 20-30" Magnesium Double Sided Stilt
Short description: SurPro set the bar and then broke it with the invention of double-sided drywall stilts. The newly updated SurPro S2 maximizes everyday performance by further elevating your comfort and stability.
Description:
Elevate Your Workflow with SurPro S2 Precision Stilts

Experience the pinnacle of professional-grade stability with the SurPro S2 Magnesium Double-Sided Stilts. Engineered for the demanding drywall contractor, these stilts redefine job-site efficiency by minimizing fatigue and maximizing balance. By utilizing a sophisticated double-sided pole architecture, the S2 series provides a rock-solid foundation that allows you to maneuver with confidence, whether you are hanging board, taping, or finishing ceilings.

Unmatched Comfort and Structural Integrity

Designed to withstand the rigors of daily heavy-duty use, the S2 features a lightweight yet incredibly durable magnesium-alloy frame. The innovative 360-degree wraparound leg bands move in harmony with your natural gait, eliminating the pressure points common in traditional single-pole designs. With a fully customizable fit—including adjustable calf height, footbed length, and lean tension—these stilts adapt to your specific biomechanics, ensuring you remain productive from the first hour to the last.

Key Features

  • Interlock Safety System: Patented redundancy technology provides peace of mind by securing all critical stress points during operation.
  • Hex-Extruded Frame: The unique hexagonal geometry offers superior structural rigidity while maintaining a lightweight profile for all-day wear.
  • Double-Clamshell Design: Enhances lateral stability and prevents the twisting motion often found in standard stilts, ensuring a consistent, balanced stance.
  • Precision Adjustability: Features comprehensive customization for leg band positioning, footplate length, and forward/backward lean tension.
  • High-Traction Soles: Industrial-grade, non-marking rubber soles deliver exceptional grip on both residential and commercial flooring surfaces.

Name: TapeTech 48" Dual Serrated Edge Magnesium Darby with Knob & Rail
Short description: TapeTech 48" Dual Serrated Edge Magnesium Darby with Knob & Rail - EMAGDARBY48-SER TapeTech darbies quickly and efficiently smooth and compact plaster and stucc...
Description:
TapeTech darbies quickly and efficiently smooth and compact

TapeTech darbies quickly and efficiently smooth and compact plaster and stucco surfaces. TapeTech offers a smooth darby and a serrated darby. Both tools effectively knock down high spots in the material and fill low spots. The smooth darby helps to smooth and seal the plaster or stucco surface while the serrated darby creates small grooves in the surface. These grooves essentially “key” the surface to improve the adhesion of the next coat of material and introduce air to the material which accelerates the drying process.

Key Features

  • Compacts plaster and stucco: Compresses the material to eliminate voids and improve adhesion.
  • Smooths and levels plaster and stucco:The long, flat blade of the darby sweeps across the wet plaster or stucco material to make it level.
  • Eliminates high spots: The darby shaves down any high spots in the plaster or stucco, leaving a flat surface.
  • Fills low spots: Use the darby to move extra material to low spots to achieve a consistent, uniform surface.
  • Improves adhesion: The serrated edge darby creates a textured surface that gives the next coat of material a better "key" or grip.
  • Accelerates drying time: The serrations allow air to circulate, which helps the material dry faster, especially in cooler or more humid conditions. This allows you to get to the next coat sooner.
  • Ergonomic Design: Ergonomic design features one knob and one handle for comfortable, all-day use and maneuverability.

Description:
Mineral Wool has great properties for EIFS applications

Mineral Wool has great properties for EIFS applications – high insulation values and is noncombustible – but has always presented a challenge for installers since it cannot be rasped or sanded to achieve the smooth, flush exterior surface required prior to EIFS, or other material, application. In response, TapeTech introduces the patented WoolShave™48 Mineral Wool Shaver. The TapeTech WoolShave™48 is the first tool specifically designed to shave the face of rigid, and semi-rigid mineral wool batts to achieve a flush surface ready for the application of EIFS.

Short description: TapeTech 12" Premium Compound Roller 3 Pack CROLL12CG3PK TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers come in a 3 pack and, are ideal for applying large amounts of d...
Description:
TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers come in a

TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers come in a 3 pack and, are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish.

Key Features

  • Highest Quality:TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life.
  • Highest Capacity:TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap: allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers.
  • Highest Coverage:The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load.
  • Robust Frame Design:TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick: stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market.
  • Comfortable Handle:The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet.
  • Extended Reach:Easily reach most common walls and ceilings using the TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job.
  • Ideal for Skimming:The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

Description:
TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for

TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds.

Key Features

  • Robust Design:Features a full 5/16” thick frame design: stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market.
  • Comfortable Handle:The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet.
  • Highest Quality:TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life.
  • Highest Capacity:When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames.
  • Highest Coverage:The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load.
  • Extended Reach:Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job.
  • Ideal for Skimming:The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.
  • Available in 4 sizes:TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.

Cordless Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry's

Cordless Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry's most portable and versatile hot wire machine. Ideally suited for EIFS and other foam-cutting professional, the EHWJS18X2 quickly cuts and notches EPS and XPS foam with unmatched precision. The EHWJS18X2 weighs just 44 pounds (including batteries) and sets up in under 2 minutes. Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry's most

Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry's most portable and versatile hot wire machine. Ideally suited for EIFS and other foam-cutting professional, the EHWJS100 quickly cuts and notches EPS and XPS foam with unmatched precision. The EHWJS100 weighs just 30 pounds and sets up in under 2 minutes. Description:
The TapeTech 18V Dual Disc Sander provides the

The TapeTech 18V Dual Disc Sander provides the ultimate portability and freedom on the jobsite to quickly sand EPS/XPS panels and many other materials, saving time and money. The 8" dual disc design features contra-rotation of the discs to provide optimal balance during operation and the independent motor reduces the weight of the tool in the worker's hands. Use a TapeTech battery adapter (sold separately) to quickly and easily use your Bosch, Makita, Milwaukee or DeWalt batteries to keep the sander running all day. The sander features an exhaust outlet that is easily connected to the TapeTech Model EIFSVAC120/EIFSVAC18V Backpack Vacuum, or other vacuums, for increased mobility and a dust free work area. The TapeTech 18V Dual Disc Sander is perfect for working from scaffolding, eliminating cords and increasing mobility. Get the only dustless vacuum drywall hand sander on the market today! The kit includes (2) 5.0 Ah batteries and a 30-minute TapeTech battery quick charger for continuous work. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. Name: TT07-C TapeTech Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
Short description: TapeTech Carbon Fiber EasyClean® Automatic Taper The Lightest TapeTech Taper Ever!
Description:
Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper

Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper. At just 5.65 pounds, the 07TT-C is up to 20% lighter than standard tapers, which helps in reducing worker fatigue. The main tube and the control tube are carbon fiber, a material that will not dent and is temperature-neutral. No more cold tubes in the winter or hot tubes in the summer! Features Include: Easy Grip Control Tube. The control tube has been lengthened 2.5" and glide wheels added to make tape cuts easier and more comfortable. The glide wheels are recessed into flanges at each end of the control tube, and act as stops for your hands - requiring much less grip-force to operate the cutter. Quick-Change Tape Bail Locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! No Hassle Cable Changes. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! Adjustable Braking System. This feature allows you to adjust the braking system for your personal preference. Now you have the control over the brake. It also can be adjusted tighter or looser to account for wear on your taper.

Name: 48XTT TapeTech 3.5" EasyRoll® Angle Head
Short description: TapeTech 3.5" EasyRoll® Angle Head Reduces drag with easy rolling rubber-tired wheels.
Description:
Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal

Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. Integrated spring adjusters allow quick change of spring tension to suit any drywall finishing job. 3.5" EasyRoll angle head can also be attached to angle box, corner box or Mudrunner to apply final smooth feathered finish to inside drywall corner angles. Tape Tech Easy Roll 3.5" corner finishing tool glides smoothly in drywall corners due to reduced friction. Use angle head to feather inside 90 degree tape corners after applying with banjo, compound applicator or automatic taper. EasyRoll angle corner finisher can also be used to apply final smooth feathered finish coat of compound, by simply attaching to an angle box (also known as flusher box, hockey box or corner applicator). Convenient spring adjustment levers quickly allow change of tension preference. Firm spring adjustment is often used when final finishing inside drywall angles, and softer setting is popular when applying tape coat. The 3.5" EasyRoll corner finisher can be used both for applying tape as well as smooth skimming finish compound to inside 90 degree drywall angle corners. Description:
The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher,

The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher, angle finisher, or glazer, is attached to a corner applicator, angle box, MudRunner® or angle head handle to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. An angle head can be used for any 90º inside drywall corner, at either wall or ceiling junctions, and embeds inside angle tape on walls and ceilings by smoothly feathering excess mud in internal corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slight corner imperfections. The TapeTech 2" corner finisher angle head is ideal for tape coats and for finishing drywall projects with narrow door legs or window trim areas. Stainless steel frames provide many years of reliable service and positive ball retainer keeps angle head securely attached to angle box, Mudrunner or angle head handle, eliminating surprise disconnects or tool damage. Combine the speed of same day multi-coat hot

Combine the speed of same day multi-coat hot mud with ATF flat box consistent finish! The 8” QuickBox™ QSX is the perfect tool for drywallers who prefer to use fast-setting joint compound when embedding the joint tape. The QuickBox™ QSX works with paper tape, fiberglass tape or the new fiber joint tapes. The QuickBox™ QSX can be used for a wide variety of applications - Tape Embed, Nail Spot, Flex Trim Coating, Tight Area, Short Runs, and more. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox™ QSX with a few light taps. QuickBox™ QSX features: A glass-filled polypropylene shell that provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. Large wheels to roll easily over any type of gypsum panels Pressure plate that opens completely for easy filling and cleaning. The box can be filled easily with the pump, the compound tube or by hand An optimized blade design that matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. Tool-free design for ultra-fast blade changes. Works with all TapeTech and major brand finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Includes two blades

Short description: TapeTech 15" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ15TT The largest Flat Box on the market! The 15" rigid design easily applies the right amount of drywall joint compound while...
Description:
The largest Flat Box on the market! The

The largest Flat Box on the market! The 15" rigid design easily applies the right amount of drywall joint compound while feathering both edges at the same time. The main extrusion strongly supports side plates for greater strength. Perfect for applying a wide finish coat to drywall flat seams or butt joints, these boxes will also fit all major brands of flat box handles. The EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll™ wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. These wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll™ wheels are more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep the finishing box on the corner bead. EasyRoll™ wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. A Wider Base For Better Results Perfect For Wide Finish Coats On Flat Seams and Butt Joints. Coat Corner Bead With EZ Roll Wheels Quick Release Thumb Latches For Easy Cleanup Rigid Shell Design Easy Blade Carrier Dial Adjustment For Precision Fits All Major Brand Drywall Flat Box Handles 5-Year Manufacturer's Warranty.

Name: QB06-QSX TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5 in Finishing Box
Short description: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5" Finishing Box QuickBox™ QSX - is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud)...
Description:
TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5" Finishing Box QuickBox™ QSX

TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5" Finishing Box QuickBox™ QSX - is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud). Combine the speed of same day multi-coat hot mud with ATF flat box consistent finish! The 6 ½” QuickBox™ QSX is the perfect tool for drywallers who prefer to use fast-setting joint compound when embedding the joint tape. The QuickBox™ QSX works with paper tape, fiberglass tape or the new fiber joint tapes. The QuickBox™ QSX can be used for a wide variety of applications - Tape Embed, Nail Spot, Flex Trim Coating, Tight Area, Short Runs, and more. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox™ QSX with a few light taps. QuickBox™ QSX features: A glass-filled polypropylene shell that provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. Large wheels to roll easily over any type of gypsum panels Pressure plate that opens completely for easy filling and cleaning. The box can be filled easily with the pump, the compound tube or by hand An optimized blade design that matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. Tool-free design for ultra-fast blade changes. Works with all TapeTech and major brand finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Includes two blades (QB6003 standard and QB6023 crown)

Key Features

  • A glass-filled polypropylene shell that provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability.
  • Large wheels to roll easily over any type of gypsum panels
  • Pressure plate that opens completely for easy filling and cleaning. The box can be filled easily with the pump, the compound tube or by hand
  • An optimized blade design that matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings.
  • Tool-free design for ultra-fast blade changes.
  • Works with all TapeTech and major brand finishing box handles, including the Wizard®.
  • Includes two blades (QB6003 standard and QB6023 crown)

The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher,

The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher, angle finisher, or glazer, is attached to a corner applicator, angle box, MudRunner® or angle head handle to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. An angle head can be used for any 90º inside drywall corner, at either wall or ceiling junctions, and embeds inside angle tape on walls and ceilings by smoothly feathering excess mud in internal corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slight corner imperfections. The TapeTech 2.5" corner finisher angle head is ideal for tape coats and for finishing drywall projects with narrow door legs or window trim areas. Stainless steel frames provide many years of reliable service and positive ball retainer keeps angle head securely attached to angle box, Mudrunner or angle head handle, eliminating surprise disconnects or tool damage. Name: TapeTech EasyClean Automatic Mini Taper 03TT
Short description: The TapeTech Mini Taper has the quality and features you expect from TapeTech but now in a Limited Edition Mini size.
Description:
TapeTech but now in a Limited Edition Mini size

TapeTech but now in a Limited Edition Mini size. You can expect great things to come in small packages with the the latest from TapeTech! Perfect for working in tight spaces where you can't fit a standard size taper! Mini Taper Length: 41 inches (104 cm) vs. Standard Taper length of 53 inches (134 cm). QUICK-CHANGE TAPE BAIL locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! NO HASSLE CABLE CHANGES. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! All TapeTech tools come with an industry-best 5-year limited warranty. Additionally, the tools can be serviced through All-Wall with 2 authorized warranty and repair locations.

  • Mini Taper Length: 41 inches (104 cm)vs.Standard Taper length of 53 inches (134 cm).

Description:
TapeTech and Graco, the Continuous Flow System is

TapeTech and Graco, the Continuous Flow System is revolutionizing drywall finishing today. The BAZOOKA™ CFS pump supplies a continuous flow of joint compound to the automatic taper (Bazooka), as well as optional flat boxes, and corner finishing tools. Increase speed, productivity, work safety, and ergonomics by Never Filling Up Again! Achieve maximum time on the wall with the BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow System. No more repetitive trips to the pump required to fill tools, and no more difficulties moving compound buckets around the jobsite for finishers. Connect your tools and workers to the BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow System, and eliminate wasted time - Increase your profits on every job! How It Works The Bazooka CFS is powered by a Graco Endurance™ Pump that delivers 1.5 GPM and features the Advantage Drive™ System with long lasting hardened steel gears. The onboard 25 gallon hopper includes an air tight lid that preserves compound overnight, and also acts as a portable wash station. The really cool feature of the BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow System - Is the FLOW! The Flow Control is based on radio frequency (RF) technology, and controls the Graco pump from the tool handle - Without Wires! The (RF) eliminates the burping and pressure builds that plague competitive units, and have the added bonus of being speed controlled inline, instead of exclusively at the pump. The Tools TapeTech BAZOOKA™ CFS drywall tools are designed to be the lightest and most ergonomic tools available. The weight of the BAZOOKA™ Taper is reduced to only 7lbs during use, and its ultra-slim design drastically reduces worker fatigue. BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow Taper Bundle Includes: Graco Continuous Flow Pump 50' Material Hose Set Continuous Flow BAZOOKA™ Taper Continuous Flow Taper & Corner Finisher Flow Controller

Name: 07TT TapeTech EasyClean Automatic Taper
Short description: TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Taper is the most advanced and enhanced drywall taping tool offered by TapeTech.
Description:
EasyClean® Taper is the most advanced and enhanced

EasyClean® Taper is the most advanced and enhanced drywall taping tool offered by TapeTech. EasyClean® lid releases with a quick turn of the single attachment screw, and makes clean-up and cable changes easier than ever. You can expect great TapeTech quality from the rest of the drywall gun as well! EASY GRIP CONTROL TUBE . The control tube has been lengthened 2.5" and glide wheels added to make tape cuts easier and more comfortable. The glide wheels are recessed into flanges at each end of the control tube, and act as stops for your hands - requiring much less grip-force to operate the cutter. QUICK-CHANGE TAPE BAIL locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! NO HASSLE CABLE CHANGES. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! NOW WITH ADJUSTABLE BRAKING SYSTEM! This new feature allows you to adjust the braking system for your personal preference. Now you have the control over the brake. It also can be adjusted tighter or looser to account for wear on your taper.

  • Adjustable brake
  • Enclosed rollers on control tube

  • Smaller diameter tube protector
  • (1) 050081F Extra spring
  • (1) 054209F Extra main cable assembly
  • (1) 056133 Extra pyramid blade

The TapeTech 4″ Hot Knife Blade is a

The TapeTech 4″ Hot Knife Blade is a precision cutting tool designed for professionals who work with foam and other soft materials. This hot knife blade offers sharp, clean cuts, making it ideal for cutting insulation boards, foam, and other materials with ease and accuracy. Key Features Sharp Cutting Edge : The blade is designed with a sharp cutting edge that ensures clean, precise cuts. It easily slices through foam, insulation boards, and other soft materials, reducing the need for additional finishing. Blade Length : With 4, 6 and 8-inch options, this blade provides the perfect balance between control and efficiency, allowing you to make detailed cuts quickly and accurately. Durable Construction : Made from high-quality materials, this hot knife blade is built to withstand the demands of professional use. It maintains its sharpness even after repeated use, ensuring long-lasting performance. Easy to Install : The blade is easy to attach to standard hot knife tools, making it simple to replace or switch out blades as needed. This ensures minimal downtime and maximum productivity on the job site.
